calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73299074 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73299074 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73299074/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73299074/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73299074/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search opinions|docket/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); matches.forEach(x => text(x));

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Richard Devillier Texas takings mandamus",fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","docketNumber","status","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"score desc"}); for (const c of (r.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Devillier v. Texas",court:"scotus",filed_after:"2024-01-01",filed_before:"2025-01-01",fields:["cluster_id","caseName","dateFiled","citation","docketNumber","absolute_url","syllabus","opinions"],num_results:5}); for (const c of (r.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:9960514,fields:["id","cluster","type","html_with_citations"]}); for (const c of (r.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"curl --fail --location --silent --show-error 'https://www.supremecourt.gov/DocketPDF/25/25-1252/407818/20260501162835028_25-%20Petition.pdf' --output /tmp/devillier-petition.pdf && pdftotext -layout /tmp/devillier-petition.pdf /tmp/devillier-petition.txt && sed -n '1,260p' /tmp/devillier-petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"python -c \"import importlib.util; print('pypdf', bool(importlib.util.find_spec('pypdf'))); print('PyPDF2', bool(importlib.util.find_spec('PyPDF2'))); print('pdfplumber', bool(importlib.util.find_spec('pdfplumber'))); print('fitz', bool(importlib.util.find_spec('fitz')))\"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"command -v mutool || true; command -v qpdf || true; command -v gs || true; command -v pdfinfo || true; file /tmp/devillier-petition.pdf; ls -lh /tmp/devillier-petition.pdf","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --with pypdf python -c \"from pypdf import PdfReader; r=PdfReader('/tmp/devillier-petition.pdf'); print(''.join((p.extract_text() or '')+'\\n' for p in r.pages))\"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --with pypdf python -c \"from pypdf import PdfReader; t='\\n'.join(p.extract_text() or '' for p in PdfReader('/tmp/devillier-petition.pdf').pages); s=t.index('REASONS FOR GRANTING THE PETITION', t.index('PETITION FOR A WRIT OF MANDAMUS')); e=t.index('CONCLUSION', s); print(t[s:e+4000])\"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":28000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --with pypdf python -c \"from pypdf import PdfReader; t='\\n'.join(p.extract_text() or '' for p in PdfReader('/tmp/devillier-petition.pdf').pages); p='REASONS FOR GRANTING THE PETITION'; print([i for i in range(len(t)) if t.startswith(p,i)])\"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --with pypdf python -c \"from pypdf import PdfReader; t='\\n'.join(p.extract_text() or '' for p in PdfReader('/tmp/devillier-petition.pdf').pages); s=21659; e=t.index('CONCLUSION',s); print(t[s:e+2000])\"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Extraordinary|mandamus|salience band|Term 2024|Term 2025|relist|CVSG|Paid|paid\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":1000}); text(r.output)
